name: two_different_item_orders_same_client_separate_thr
description: Two different item orders, same client, separate threads — must stay separate
expected_output: Two separate parent tasks for Client A: Tandoor order and Generator order. Different items, same client.
pass_criteria: PASS: Two separate parent tasks for different items. FAIL: Both items grouped under single order.
challenge: Same client placing two different orders on different days. Must not conflate into one order.
notes: Tests item-level order separation for same client
